_readme: UNSEEN — CITADEL asset generation spec (ART_PIPELINE.md §10). The machine-readable work-list a session walks to 'crank out a bunch' of PixelLab assets that all UNIFY. Each entry = one PixelLab MCP call. Runbook: tools/generate_citadel.md. Log every generated asset in assets/generation_manifest.csv. Raw output -> assets/tiles/citadel/raw/, hand-finished -> assets/tiles/citadel/finished/.

palette._note: LOCKED master palette (assets/style_bible/README.md). Every prompt names these; the ingest step (tools/ingest_tile.py) snaps to them so hundreds of assets share one saturation.

defaults._note: Applied to every asset unless the entry overrides. 32px native tiles are the practical choice — create_topdown_tileset standard supports only 16/32 (64 needs pro). The §2 '48px lock' is for CHARACTERS; ground/roof tiles render at 32px native and Godot scales them to the map cell size. Bump a hero tile to 64 via create_tiles_pro if it needs more detail.
defaults.saturation: muted, low saturation, clean not retro

assets.unify_by: This is the FIRST ground tileset — it seeds the base tile IDs every other ground tileset chains from. Hand-finish ONE tile from it as _style_anchor.png before generating anything else.

params.lower_description: packed dark medieval dirt, patchy and dirty, muted low saturation
params.upper_description: worn cobblestone town road, muted grey-brown stone, low saturation
params.transition_description: loose dirt scattered over the cobble edges

assets.unify_by: Chain: feed td_dirt_road's UPPER (road) base-tile id as lower_base_tile_id so the road matches exactly.

params.lower_description: worn cobblestone town road, muted grey-brown stone
params.upper_description: large flat flagstone plaza paving, muted warm stone
params.transition_description: cobbles giving way to cut flagstones

assets.unify_by: Chain: feed td_dirt_road's LOWER (dirt) base-tile id as lower_base_tile_id.

params.lower_description: packed dark medieval dirt, patchy and dirty
params.upper_description: patchy dry grass and moss, muted olive, low saturation
params.transition_description: sparse grass tufts poking through dirt

assets.unify_by: Chain: feed td_dirt_road's LOWER (dirt) base-tile id as upper_base_tile_id so the bank matches the ground. Water uses the locked water palette #3a7fa8/#4f93bc.

params.lower_description: calm shallow canal water, muted teal, gentle ripples
params.transition_description: wet muddy shoreline with a thin foam line

assets.unify_by: Pass _style_anchor.png in style_images (color_palette+outline+shading true) so all four roofs share the world's saturation.

params.description: 1). terracotta clay tile roof 2). weathered wood shingle roof 3). thatch straw roof 4). grey slate tile roof — all muted, low saturation, clean pixel art

assets.unify_by: style_images = roof_fills (so trims match the roof fills exactly).

params.description: 1). terracotta roof ridge cap 2). roof eave OVERHANG edge casting a soft shadow below 3). roof hip corner 4). roof valley gutter — muted, low saturation
1). rough stone block wall 2). cream plaster wall 3). medieval timber-frame tudor wall 4). stone wall with an arched wooden door — muted, low saturation
